headline: Gilead Sciences (GILD) Stock Dips While Market Gains: Key Facts
summary: Gilead Sciences (GILD) reached $130.4 at the closing of the latest trading day, reflecting a -2.42% change compared to its last close.

headline: Gilead’s Arcus Pullback and Idvynso HIV Challenge Might Change The Case For Investing In GILD
summary: In April 2026, Arcus Biosciences said Gilead Sciences chose not to make a continuation payment, ending option rights to several early-stage Arcus programs while keeping time-limited options on select assets like AB801, AB598, AB102 and a TNF inhibitor. Around the same time, Merck’s newly approved Idvynso, a two-drug HIV regimen shown as non-inferior to Gilead’s Biktarvy, underscored rising competitive pressure in Gilead’s core HIV market just as it refines which external pipeline bets to...

headline: Earnings Season Didn’t Drive The Market. Chips Did.
